description: A beginner's guide on resolving disputes in Binance P2P orders, covering payment issues and support options.
topic_summary: This video explains how to handle disputes in Binance P2P transactions, including steps to take when payments do not match or when there are disagreements between traders [t=0:32]. It emphasizes the importance of communication with Binance support and the role of escrow accounts in protecting both parties [t=1:31].
